chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P No.D-1069 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(s) For orders on office objection. For katcha peshi. For hearing of M.A No.4802/17. 12-10-2017. Ms. Razia Ali Zaman Patoli, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ismial Bhutto, Additional A.G alongwith SHO PS Sakrand o/b respondent No.3. = Petitioner is essentially seeking protection in accordance with law against the harassment allegedly caused to him by private respondents. Learned A.A.G has filed comments on behalf of respondents No.2 to 4 taken on record. SHO of PS Sakrand, who has appeared on behalf of respondent No.3 has assured that protection in accordance with law would be provided to petitioner, which has satisfied the counsel for petitioner and she seeks disposal of the petition in said terms. This petition is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Fahad Memon
